skill.name: beautiful-prose
skill.description: Hard-edged writing style contract for timeless, forceful English prose without AI tics
skill.summary: Transform AI-generated text into sharp, human-sounding prose that avoids robotic patterns and cliches
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 4 patterns that are all false positives. URLs at lines 4 and 22 are documentation references in markdown, not network calls. 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' detections at lines 3 and 20 are misidentifications of plain text content. This skill contains only writing guidance with no executable code, network access, or security risks.

risk_factor_evidence.reasoning: These are markdown documentation links to GitHub repositories, not actual network requests. The skill contains no code that executes network calls.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URL in Documentation
low_findings.description: GitHub repository URL appears in YAML frontmatter as source reference
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URL is a documentation reference only, not used in any code execution context

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URL in Documentation
low_findings.description: GitHub repository URL linked in markdown reference at end of file
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URL is a documentation reference only, not used in any code execution context

content.value_statement: AI-generated text often sounds robotic and formulaic. Beautiful Prose transforms generic AI output into forceful, timeless writing that reads like it came from a skilled human author.
actual_capabilities: Transform robotic AI text into natural, forceful prose
Remove common AI writing tics and cliches
Apply hard-edged writing style principles to any content
Maintain clarity and impact while eliminating fluff
Preserve author voice while improving readability
limitations: Does not generate original content from scratch
Requires existing text to transform and polish
Style preferences are prescriptive, not customizable
Best suited for English language content only

use_cases.title: Blog Post Refinement
use_cases.description: Polish AI-drafted blog posts to sound more human and engaging before publishing

use_cases.title: Professional Communication
use_cases.description: Transform generic email drafts and documents into sharp, authoritative business writing

use_cases.title: Academic and Technical Writing
use_cases.description: Refine research summaries and technical documentation for clarity and impact

prompt_templates.title: Basic Text Polish
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this text and rewrite it using the beautiful-prose style guidelines. Remove AI tics, eliminate fluff, and make it sound like sharp human writing: [paste your text]

prompt_templates.title: Before and After Comparison
prompt_templates.prompt: Take this AI-generated paragraph and show me both the original and your beautiful-prose revision. Highlight what you changed and why: [paste your text]

prompt_templates.title: Style Analysis and Rewrite
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this text for AI writing patterns and cliches. List the issues you find, then rewrite it using hard-edged prose principles: [paste your text]

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Pass Refinement
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply beautiful-prose transformation to this document in three passes: first remove fluff and cliches, second tighten sentence structure, third polish for rhythm and impact. Show me each stage: [paste your text]

output_examples.input: In today's rapidly evolving landscape, leveraging cutting-edge solutions is paramount for organizations seeking to maximize their potential and drive meaningful outcomes.
output_examples.output: Organizations that want results must adopt better solutions. The landscape changes fast. Adapt or fall behind.

output_examples.input: It's important to note that the implementation of this feature requires careful consideration of multiple factors that could potentially impact the overall user experience in significant ways.
output_examples.output: This feature affects users directly. Build it carefully or they will notice.

best_practices: Always provide complete paragraphs or sections for context-aware transformation
Review the transformed output to ensure your intended meaning is preserved
Use iteratively on long documents, working section by section for consistent results
anti_patterns: Do not use on text that requires technical precision over style, such as legal documents or code comments
Avoid applying to content where soft, diplomatic language is strategically important
Do not expect the skill to fact-check or verify claims in your source text

faq.question: What writing problems does beautiful-prose solve?
faq.answer: It removes AI writing patterns like excessive hedging, corporate jargon, passive constructions, and empty phrases. The result is direct, forceful prose that sounds human.

faq.question: Can I customize the style intensity?
faq.answer: The style guidelines are prescriptive by design. For customization, provide additional instructions with your text specifying desired tone adjustments.

faq.question: Does this work on technical or academic writing?
faq.answer: Yes, but it prioritizes clarity over formality. Use it to make dense content more readable while preserving accuracy and key terminology.

faq.question: Will it change my voice or argument?
faq.answer: It preserves your core message while removing stylistic weaknesses. Review outputs to ensure your intended emphasis and tone remain intact.

faq.question: What types of content work best with this skill?
faq.answer: Essays, articles, emails, reports, blog posts, and general prose. It is less suitable for poetry, creative fiction, or content requiring specific formatting.

faq.question: How much text should I submit at once?
faq.answer: Submit one to three paragraphs for best results. Longer documents should be processed section by section to maintain consistency and quality.
